items.title: Brief Program Improves QoL in Patients With Severe Allergies
items.description: Small gains in self-efficacy and injectable epinephrine prescription use were measured. Medscape Medical News

items.title: Rise of NPs Leads to More Advanced Certifications
items.description: Much of the growth among the nurse practitioner workforce is expected to be in emergency medicine and more complex clinical roles. Medscape Medical Ne...

items.title: NHS to Fund Ruxolitinib for Vitiligo
items.description: NICE has recommended topical ruxolitinib for facial non-segmental vitiligo in patients aged 12 or over after a revised cost review. Medscape News UK

items.title: Fewer Newborns Receive Hepatitis B Vaccination
items.description: New data show newborn hepatitis B vaccination rates have dropped, raising concern over rising misinformation. Medscape Medical News
